title: Vermeil 128x
description: Resource pack for the popular anime Vermeil in gold!
body:
Anime resource pack Vermeil in gold 128x. 
As planned, it will be used on pvp 1.8.9 (Wait for version 1.16.5!)![vermeil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d48d194fc18baa61ce3095a5ff826902b78465.png)
Have you always wanted a resource pack for pvp on 1.8.9? Here it is! Anime resource pack for pvp! Take out everyone!!!
